lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride?

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Minecart rides are 20 coins.

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride?

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: As a loyal customer of the Lovakengj Minecart Network, you're entitled to this.

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Now, can I help you today?

sections.title: Attempting to travel to Shayzien East while already there

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: You're already here, human.

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Sorry, human, you can't use the Lovakengj Minecart Network. Speak to Miriam, at the main station by the southern Lovakengj bank, if you've got any questions.

sections.title: Setting up the Lovakengj Minecart Network

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Sorry, human, the Lovakengj Minecart Network is for citizens of Lovakengj only.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got this control scroll for you.

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Thanks, human. I guess it's okay for you to ride my carts after all. So, can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

sections.title: After giving him the Minecart control scroll

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: Thanks again for bringing me that control scroll. Can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

sections.title: Trying to use a second Minecart control scroll on him

lines.speaker: Mogrim
lines.text: No thanks, you've already given me one of those.
